thread.title: South Florida teacher arrested for lewd acts with student, more possible victims
thread.title_full: South Florida teacher arrested for lewd acts with student, more possible victims

author: Skyler Shepard
title: South Florida teacher arrested for lewd acts with student, more possible victims
text: DEERFIELD BEACH, Fla. (CBS12) — A private school teacher from South Florida was arrested on Friday for allegedly engaging in inappropriate sexual acts with a 14-year-old student. The Broward Sheriff's Office (BSO) said Candace Brown was a teacher at Sawgrass Adventist School — a Christian private school in Plantation. According to detectives, the 35-year-old woman is accused of engaging in lewd and lascivious acts with a 14-year-old boy. The victim told detectives the sexual acts occurred in Deerfield Beach over the summer. Brown surrendered herself to authorities at the Broward County Main Jail on Nov. 22. She faces two counts of lewd and lascivious battery involving a victim less than 16 years old, as well as one count each of lewd and lascivious conduct and transmission of material harmful to a minor by electronic device. See also: Vero Beach airport gains three new routes Detectives said there may be additional victims. Anyone with information is urged to contact Detective Arielle Dickey at 954-321-4256. Those who wish to remain anonymous can call to Broward County Crime Stoppers at 954-493-TIPS (8477). Find more ways to stay up to date with your latest local news.
